entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used for improving the estimation of stream characteristics in regions where field data is limited

entities.name: ENTROPY THEORY
entities.description: Theoretical framework integrated with remote sensing to address limitations in streamflow estimation

entities.name: MODIS-LANDSAT FUSION IMAGERY
entities.description: Fused pixels of 30m x 1-day resolution derived from MODIS and Landsat sensors

entities.name: SURFACE VELOCITY
entities.description: Velocity derived from fused pixels at the deepest river sections

entities.name: ENTROPY-BASED VELOCITY MODEL
entities.description: Model that applies RS-derived velocity to estimate river discharge

entities.name: RIVER DISCHARGE
entities.description: The volume of water moving through a river channel per unit of time

entities.name: STAGE-AREA RELATIONSHIP
entities.description: Established relationship at gauging sites used to estimate river discharge

entities.name: ENHANCED SPATIOTEMPORAL ADAPTIVE REFLECTANCE FUSION MODEL
entities.description: Model used for the spectral fusion of coarse resolution MODIS and fine resolution Landsat pixels

entities.name: BRAHMANI RIVER
entities.description: The river system where the entropy-RS integrated framework was field-tested

entities.name: JENAPUR
entities.description: A gauging station on the Brahmani River

entities.description: A gauging station on the Brahmani River

entities.name: PANPOSH
entities.description: A gauging station on the Brahmani River

entities.name: SCANTY DATA AVAILABILITY
entities.description: Condition of limited field data at gauging stations

entities.name: NASH-SUTCLIFFE MODEL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Metric used to evaluate the performance of the streamflow estimation framework
